title: Short-Form Content Clipper & Distribution Specialist (Part-Time)
description:
I’m looking for a skilled, reliable, and self-motivated virtual assistant to help me build and operate a short-form content distribution system for my YouTube ministry channel, Prophetic Pigeons.

This is NOT a generic social media management role. You will be building a multi-account distribution network from scratch — creating and managing 40+ themed social media accounts across TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and X 
), then clipping and distributing short-form video content across all of them on a daily basis.

Your job has two content tracks:

Track 1 — Curated Content (Other Creators)

You will identify, clip, and post viral content from well-known faith and prophetic creators across the space. This is how we grow the accounts — by curating the best content in the niche so each themed page builds a real, engaged following. You will always credit original creators appropriately.

Track 2 — Original Content (Prophetic Pigeons)

You will clip my long-form YouTube teachings, sermons, Bible studies, and prophetic content into short-form videos (15–90 seconds) optimized for each platform. These clips get mixed into the account feeds alongside the curated content at a strategic ratio.



The goal: build 40+ active themed pages that collectively generate hundreds of thousands of views per month, driving attention and followers back to the main Prophetic Pigeons channel.



Key Responsibilities

Account Creation & Growth

 ? Create and warm 40+ niche-themed accounts across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and X

 ? Follow proper account warming protocols (7–10 days of organic engagement before posting)

 ? Develop unique bios, profile images, and niche angles for each account

 ? Manage cross-account engagement (comments, duets/stitches, story shares)

Competitive Research & Curation

 ? Identify the top 15–20 viral creators in the faith, prophetic, Bible teaching, and worship space

 ? Monitor trending clips weekly and pull top performers into the content rotation

 ? Track which content formats, hooks, and topics perform best across platforms

 ? Build and maintain a clip source library organized by creator, topic, and platform

Clip Production

 ? Clip long-form Prophetic Pigeons videos into 15–25 short-form pieces per video

 ? Clip viral moments from other established creators in the faith space

 ? Add captions (auto-generated + reviewed for accuracy), hook text overlays, and branded outro frames

 ? Create 2–3 hook variations per clip for multi-account distribution

 ? Produce 80–100+ clips per month across both content tracks

Distribution & Scheduling

 ? Post 2–3x per day per account (mix of curated + original content)

 ? Stagger posting times across accounts to avoid platform spam detection

 ? Maintain a content calendar and posting schedule

 ? Target 2,000–3,000+ total posts per month across the network by Month 2

Analytics & Reporting

 ? Track follower growth, views, and engagement per account weekly

 ? Identify top-performing clips, hooks, formats, and posting times

 ? Deliver a simple weekly analytics report

 ? Recommend strategy adjustments based on data

Systems & Documentation (Month 3)

 ? Document all workflows into a comprehensive SOP package

 ? Create brand guidelines, clip templates, and approved content examples

 ? Set up and build out a Whop community for external clippers

 ? Write onboarding materials and submission guidelines for clippers

 ? Assist in recruiting and onboarding the first 5–8 clippers



Required Skills

 ? Strong experience with short-form video editing — CapCut proficiency is essential

 ? Deep familiarity with TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and X — you understand how the algorithms work, what content gets pushed, and how to grow pages

 ? Experience creating or managing theme pages / fan pages / clip accounts — this is the #1 qualification. If you’ve built niche pages before, you understand the game.

 ? Eye for viral content — you can watch a 30-minute video and know which 45 seconds will get the most engagement

 ? Self-motivated and organized — this is a part-time role with a lot of autonomy. You need to manage your own schedule and hit daily posting targets without being micromanaged.

 ? Comfortable working with faith-based / Christian content — you don’t have to share the faith, but you must be respectful of the content and understand the audience

 ? Strong written English — for captions, bios, and clipper community management

title: Marketing & Communications Associate
description:
Long Island Select Healthcare is a Federally Qualified Health Center (FQHC) based in Suffolk County, New York, serving over 8,500 patients annually across multiple locations. We provide comprehensive primary care, behavioral health, dental, and specialty services to individuals and families across Long Island, including a significant population of individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities (IDD).



We are seeking a highly skilled, detail-oriented, and self-motivated Marketing & Communications Associate to support our Director of Marketing & Development. This is a full-time remote position requiring availability during Eastern Time business hours. The ideal candidate brings exceptional English writing skills, strong creative instincts, and proven proficiency across graphic design, video production, digital marketing, and content strategy.



This role is fast-paced, high-output, and mission-driven. You will work directly with the Director and, when authorized, with internal staff and external partners including vendors, sponsors, legislators, and media contacts. Healthcare experience is a plus, but drive, precision, and creativity are non-negotiable.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:

Content & Copywriting



Draft, edit, and proofread marketing copy for social media,
 campaigns, web pages, press releases, donor communications, sponsorship materials, and event collateral

Write long-form content including newsletter articles, blog posts, grant narrative support, and community health education pieces

Adapt tone and voice for multiple audiences: patients, donors, corporate sponsors, government stakeholders, and the general public

Maintain brand voice consistency across all written materials



Graphic Design



Design print and digital materials including flyers, brochures, signage, event materials, social media graphics,
 headers, sponsor decks, and presentation slides

Proficient in Canva (required); Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) strongly preferred

Execute design briefs from concept through final production-ready file

Resize and adapt designs across formats and platforms



Video Production & Editing



Produce, edit, and export short-form video content for social media (Instagram Reels,
, YouTube Shorts)

Edit raw footage, add captions, music, text overlays, and branding elements

Support creation of patient testimonial videos, event recap content, and promotional campaigns

Comfortable working with tools such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, or equivalent



Digital Marketing



Assist with scheduling and publishing content across
, Instagram, LinkedIn, and other platforms

Support Google Ads and Meta Ads campaign monitoring, reporting, and asset creation

Pull performance reports from Google Analytics 4, Meta Ads Manager, and other platforms

Help manage and update website content as directed



Event & Campaign Support



Provide comprehensive support for the organization's annual fundraising events, including the 1st Annual Benefit Golf Classic (August 2026) and other signature events

Assist with sponsor outreach tracking, sponsor packet assembly, landing page updates, and logistics coordination

Build and maintain event timelines, checklists, and project management entries in Monday.com and/or Asana

Support logistics coordination for community outreach events, ribbon cuttings, and public-facing activities



Development & Fundraising Support



Assist with donor communications, acknowledgment letters, and stewardship materials

Support capital campaign and annual giving efforts with design and copy assets

Help maintain donor and sponsor tracking records in HubSpot CRM

Research grant opportunities and assist with narrative drafting when directed



Administrative & Project Management



Manage and update project boards in Monday.com and Asana

Maintain organized digital asset libraries (logos, photos, templates, documents)

Track deadlines and flag deliverables proactively

Prepare meeting agendas, notes, and follow-up summaries when needed

Communicate professionally with internal staff and approved external contacts on behalf of the Director



Marketing Strategy



Contribute to the development and execution of marketing plans for service line promotions, patient acquisition campaigns, and community outreach initiatives

Assist in identifying target audiences, messaging strategies, and channel selection for campaigns across digital and print

Support tracking and reporting on campaign performance metrics including reach, engagement, patient inquiry volume, and cost per acquisition

Research competitor positioning, community health trends, and demographic data to inform strategic recommendations

Help develop content calendars, campaign timelines, and go-to-market plans for new programs, locations, and events



TO APPLY:

Please submit all of the following. Incomplete applications will not be considered.



Resume or CV -- current, detailed, and in English

Cover letter -- written in English, explaining your interest in this role and summarizing your most relevant experience. This is how we assess written communication quality. Templated or generic letters will be disqualified.

Portfolio -- links to samples of your graphic design and video editing work. Work must be your own.

DISC Personality Assessment -- complete the free assessment at the link below and include your results (screenshot or summary) with your application. This is required and non-negotiable.



DISC Assessment Link: https://www.truity.com/test/disc-personality-test

We are looking for a collaborative, detail-oriented, and driven individual who communicates clearly and thrives in a fast-paced, mission-driven environment. Your DISC profile helps us understand how you work, communicate, and handle pressure -- there is no right or wrong result.



Availability confirmation: Please state in your application that you are available Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM Eastern Time. Applications that do not confirm availability will not be reviewed.



REQUIRED SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:



Excellent written and spoken English -- this is a strict requirement; your application must demonstrate it

Minimum 2 years of experience in marketing, communications, or a related field

Strong graphic design portfolio demonstrating professional-quality work

Demonstrated video editing experience with sample work available

Proficiency in Canva (required) and Adobe Creative Suite (strongly preferred)

Experience with social media management and content scheduling tools

Familiarity with Google Analytics, Meta Ads Manager, or similar platforms

Comfortable working in project management tools (Monday.com, Asana, or equivalent)

Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple deadlines simultaneously

Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision

Reliable internet connection and a professional home office setup

Availability strictly during Eastern Time hours (8:00 AM to 4:00 PM ET, Monday through Friday)



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS (Nice to Have):



Experience working with U.S.-based nonprofit organizations, healthcare providers, or community health centers

Familiarity with Federally Qualified Health Centers (FQHCs), New York State health systems, or healthcare marketing compliance

Experience with HubSpot CRM

Knowledge of HIPAA basics as it relates to marketing and patient communications

Experience supporting fundraising events, donor relations, or grant writing

title: Funnelish Funnel Builder — Copy, Rebrand & Translate Competitor Advertorials (Daily Work)
description:
BUDGET: $15 USD per funnel | 7 days a week (Past experience with proof is needed)



---



ABOUT THE ROLE

--------------

I run a dropshipping business selling health and skincare products in Portugal. I need a funnel builder who can take

competitor advertorials and product pages, rebrand them to my brand and

colors, translate them into the target language, and publish them — fast.



This is a 7-days-a-week ongoing role. If you are reliable and fast,

you will have consistent daily work with me long-term.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO EACH TIME

---------------------
. I send you a competitor advertorial/product page URL

2. You study the layout, structure and copy style

3. You use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to:

   - Translate it into the target language (Portuguese)

   - Rebrand all product names, brand names and claims to my brand

   - Rebrand all product images to match our branding

4. You rebuild the page in Funnelish

  5. You apply my brand colors, fonts and logo throughout

6. You deliver a live preview link within 48 hours



Each funnel = 1 advertorial page + 1 product/order page.



---



WHAT I PROVIDE

---------------

- Competitor reference URLs for each funnel

- My brand name, logo, colors and product images

- Product details and any specific claims to include or avoid

- Fast feedback — I will review and approve within 24 hours



---



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR

---------------------

? MUST HAVE Past Experience building advertorial-style pages (the "article that sells" format)

? Comfortable using AI tools to rewrite and translate copy

? MUST HAVE Experience with Funnelish

? Can match the look and feel of a reference page closely

? Reliable — available 7 days a week, responds within a few hours

? Fast — 48-hour turnaround per funnel is the expectation

? Good eye for design — pages must look professional and trustworthy



---



TO APPLY — ANSWER THESE 5 QUESTIONS

--------------------------------------

Applications without answers to all 5 questions will be ignored.



1. How long have you been using Funnelish?

2. Have you built advertorial/pre-lander pages before?

   Share 2 live examples or screenshots.

3. Have you used AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) for copywriting or

   translation?

4. Can you work 7 days a week and deliver within 48 hours per funnel?

5. Leave your number in this format +?6?3?1?2?3?4?5?6?7?8

---



RATE: $15 USD per complete funnel (advertorial + product page)

TYPE: Full-time ongoing, 7 days a week

HOURS: Flexible — async communication is fine, but fast responses expected

START: Immediately

s)

• Comfortable making calls and conducting interviews 

• Experience in recruiting, hiring, or lead generation

• Highly organized and results-driven 

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment

Big Plus If You Have

• Experience sourcing through
, Craigslist, or Google 

• Experience recruiting construction or skilled trades 

• Knowledge of real estate investing or renovations 

• Experience working with U.S.-based companies 

________________________________________

Compensation & Growth

• Competitive base pay (based on experience) 

• Bonuses for successful hires and performance 

• Opportunity to grow into a Head of Recruiting role 

• High performers can earn significant income as we scale

 Why This Role Is Different

, Craigslist, Indeed, etc.)

title: Project Manager – Single Family Fix & Flips (Real Estate Investment Company | Full-Time, Remote)
description:
We are a fast-growing real estate investment company based in Maryland, USA. We purchase and renovate 75+ single-family homes per year, and we’re looking for an experienced Project Manager to help oversee and manage our renovation pipeline.



This is a critical role responsible for keeping projects on time, on budget, and running efficiently.



Your Responsibilities:

Manage multiple fix & flip renovation projects from start to finish

Coordinate with contractors, subcontractors, and vendors

Review scopes of work and ensure projects are executed correctly

Track budgets, timelines, and job progress across all properties

Identify and solve issues quickly to avoid delays or cost overruns

Ensure materials are ordered and delivered on time

Communicate regularly with our internal team on project status

Maintain organized records, updates, and reporting systems

Help improve systems and processes as we scale

Requirements:

Proven experience managing single-family home renovations / construction projects

Strong understanding of rehab scopes, sequencing, and timelines

Ability to manage multiple projects at once

Excellent communication and organizational skills

Detail-oriented with strong follow-up and accountability

Ability to work in a fast-paced, high-volume environment

Preferred Experience:

Experience working with real estate investors or fix & flip companies

Familiarity with U.S. construction standards and expectations

Experience with tools like Podio, Buildertrend, 
, Excel/Google Sheets, etc.

What Makes This Opportunity Unique:

We complete 75+ projects per year (consistent volume)

Long-term, stable position with a growing company

Opportunity to grow into a senior leadership role

Work directly with a high-performing acquisitions and operations team

How to Apply:



Please include:



A detailed description of your experience managing construction or renovation projects (specifically single-family homes if applicable)

The technology/tools you have used to manage projects and why you prefer them

How many projects you have managed at one time

Why you would be a strong fit for this role



We are looking for someone who takes ownership, communicates well, and can help us scale efficiently.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO & COO – Real Estate Investment Company (Full-Time, Long-Term Opportunity)
description:
We are a fast-growing real estate investment company based in Maryland, USA, purchasing and renovating 70+ houses per year. We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Executive Assistant to work directly with our CEO and COO.



This is a high-impact role where you will be deeply involved in daily operations and play a key part in helping us scale.



Your Role & Responsibilities:



You will be responsible for supporting leadership and helping keep operations running smoothly:



Managing transaction coordination (contracts, timelines, follow-ups)

Communicating with and coordinating contractors & vendors

Ordering materials and tracking deliveries for renovation projects

Submitting offers on properties and assisting with acquisitions

Tracking and reporting on KPIs and company performance

Organizing and maintaining data, files, and systems

Preparing and sending DocuSign documents

Managing schedules, tasks, and follow-ups for CEO & COO

Ensuring nothing falls through the cracks across multiple projects

Who We’re Looking For:

Strong experience as an Executive Assistant (required)

Excellent English communication skills (written & verbal)

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities

Proactive problem solver who takes initiative

Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment

Bonus Experience (Preferred but Not Required):

Experience in real estate investing, wholesaling, or property management

Knowledge of construction or renovation processes

Familiarity with tools like Podio, GoHighLevel, DocuSign, Google Sheets, etc.

Why This Role is Different:

Work directly with high-level operators (CEO & COO)

Be part of a company doing 70+ deals per year

Opportunity for growth, increased responsibility, and higher pay

Long-term, stable position with a winning team

 How to Apply:



Please include the following:



A short paragraph about your Executive Assistant experience

Any experience you have with real estate or construction

Examples of tools/systems you’ve used

Why you would be a great fit for this role

A video introduction answers the questions 



If you are highly organized, driven, and want to grow with a fast-moving real estate company, we want to hear from you.

title: UI/UX Design & System Architecture for Advanced CRM Platform
description:
We are building a modern, scalable CRM platform similar to tools like Workiz and Salesforce, tailored for service-based businesses (locksmith, field services, etc.).



The system will include customer management, communication (calls/SMS), job tracking, invoicing, and real-time activity monitoring.



We are looking for a high-level UI/UX Designer + Product Architect who can design both:



A clean, intuitive interface (web + mobile)

A scalable system structure (UX flows + architecture thinking)

???? Scope of Work

1. UI/UX Design

Design a modern, clean CRM dashboard

Create full user flows:

Customer management

Job/work order management

SMS/chat interface

Call logs & recordings

Payments & invoices

Design for:

Desktop (primary)

Mobile responsive

Create:

Wireframes (low + high fidelity)

Final UI screens (Figma or similar)

Design system (colors, components, typography)

2. UX Strategy & Product Thinking

Define user journeys for:

Admin

Dispatcher

Technician

Optimize for:

Speed (few clicks to complete actions)

Real-time usage (live calls, updates)

Suggest improvements based on existing CRMs (like Workiz)

3. System Architecture (High-Level)



We are NOT looking for deep backend coding, but we DO need:



System structure planning:

Modules (CRM, calls, messaging, payments)

User roles & permissions

Data flow diagrams:

How calls/SMS integrate

How jobs move through pipeline

Recommendations for:

Tech stack (frontend/backend)

Scalable infrastructure (multi-user system)

4. Features to Design

Dashboard (KPIs, live activity)

Customer profiles

Job scheduling & dispatch board

Chat/SMS system (like iMessage style)

Call system (logs + recordings)

Invoice & payment screen

Notifications system

???? Requirements

Proven experience designing CRM / SaaS platforms

Strong portfolio (preferably similar systems)

Experience with tools like:

Figma

Adobe XD (optional)

Understanding of UX for real-time systems

Bonus:

Experience with VoIP / communication platforms

Experience with field-service businesses

???? Deliverables

Full UI/UX design (Figma file)

Wireframes + final screens

Design system

User flows & diagrams

High-level system architecture documentation

???? Ideal Candidate



We’re looking for someone who:



Thinks like a product owner, not just a designer

Can simplify complex systems

Understands how CRM businesses actually operate

Can build something better than existing platforms, not just copy

???? Goal



To create a powerful, scalable, and easy-to-use CRM that can support 1000+ users, real-time communication, and future expansion.

title: Customer Support
description:
Looking for a reliable work-from-home job with no calls? We’ve got a chat-based opportunity for you.



We’re currently hiring Chat Support & Sales Virtual Assistants to join our remote team. This is a long-term position with stable income — not just a short-term gig. We’re especially looking for motivated individuals from the Philippines who want consistent online work.



This is 100% chat-based — no voice or video calls required.



What you can expect:

• Weekly payments (always on time)

• Fully remote work setup

• Stable, long-term opportunity

• Bonuses based on performance

• Step-by-step training and clear system

• Supportive team environment

• Opportunity to increase your earnings over time



Your responsibilities:

• Respond to messages on our chat platform

• Keep conversations engaging and professional

• Handle multiple chats during your shift

• Work within a structured system

• Follow simple scripts and guidelines



Who we’re looking for:

• Basic to good written English

• Availability for scheduled shifts

• Interest in long-term remote work

• Willingness to learn and follow instructions

• Reliable internet connection



No experience needed — full training is provided.



Apply here (only through this form):





We are actively reviewing applications and onboarding new tea
mbers.

If you’re ready for stable online work and want to grow your income, apply now.

description:
We’re a Las Vegas-based drain cleaning company focused on one thing:



???? Driving high-intent inbound calls and booked jobs — consistently.



We are looking for a senior-level SEO + Google Ads operator who has a track record of generating real leads for US-based local service businesses (plumbing, HVAC, etc.)



This is not a “traffic” role.

This is a performance role tied to calls, cost per lead, and revenue.



?

 • Reduced cost per lead across campaigns

 • High-converting landing pages aligned with search intent



?



? REQUIREMENTS:

 • Hands-on experience managing Google Ads (search + call-driven campaigns)

 • Deep understanding of high-intent keyword strategy

 • Experience optimizing Google Business Profile (Maps rankings)

 • Ability to build or guide conversion-focused landing pages

 • Strong grasp of call tracking, attribution, and lead quality



?



???? THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR:

 • Content writers or blog-focused SEOs

 • Backlink-only specialists

 • General VAs doing “SEO tasks”

 • Anyone without real performance metrics



?



???? IDEAL CANDIDATE:



You’ve:

 • Managed campaigns where phone calls were the primary KPI

 • Worked in competitive local markets

 • Made decisions based on data, not theory

 • Owned results — not just tasks



?



???? RESPONSIBILITIES:

 • Own and optimize Google Ads campaigns

 • Identify and rank for high-converting local keywords

 • Align SEO, paid traffic, and Maps for maximum coverage

 • Improve conversion rates across landing pages

 • Continuously reduce cost per lead while increasing volume



?



???? TO APPLY:



Answer the following clearly and specifically:



1. Describe a local service campaign where you increased calls or leads. Include numbers if possible.

2. If you were starting from scratch, how would you generate calls for a drain cleaning company in Las Vegas within 30–60 days?

3. What would you prioritize first: SEO, Google Ads, or Maps — and why?



?



???? HOURS & STRUCTURE:

?



???? FINAL NOTE:



We are looking for someone who thinks like an operator, not a task-doer.

If you’ve produced real results and can do it again, this will be a strong long-term opportunity.
salary: Higher pay for proven call generation

title: Content creation manager
description:
Content Creation (Part-Time, Remote | Growth Opportunity)

We are a fast-growing health & wellness brand focused on functional medicine (thyroid, metabolism, and root-cause healing). We’re looking for a high-performing Content Creation Assistant to help us scale across social media with intention and quality.

This is not a basic VA role — we are looking for someone who understands content, trends, and storytelling, and wants to grow with a brand long-term.

Role Overview

You will be responsible for supporting our content engine end-to-end:

Researching trends and viral content

Ideating and scripting posts

Editing and repurposing content

Posting across platforms (IG, TikTok, etc.)

Responsibilities

Study viral content and trends daily (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

Generate content ideas aligned with our niche (health/functional medicine)

Write scripts for:

Storytelling short-form videos

Educational content

Viral-style hooks and angles

Edit videos (B-roll, captions, pacing, hooks)

Repurpose long-form into multiple short-form pieces

Create carousel posts (educational + engaging)

Schedule and post content consistently

Collaborate and communicate with the team for feedback and improvements

Content Types You’ll Work On

Story-driven short-form videos

Viral-style content (hooks, trends, angles)

Educational/authority content

B-roll style videos

Carousel posts

Long-form ? short-form repurposing

Requirements

Strong understanding of social media trends and viral content

Experience with video editing tools (CapCut, etc.)

Good sense of storytelling, hooks, and audience psychology

High attention to detail and quality

Professional, reliable, and communicative

Fast learner with a growth mindset

Able to take feedback and improve quickly

Work Schedule

Part-time: 4 hours/day

1:00 PM – 5:00 PM PST (fixed schedule)

Compensation

$400/month (first 3 months – training period)

$500/month after 3 months (based on performance and fit)

Opportunity for long-term growth and increased responsibility

Who This Is For

This role is ideal for someone who:

Wants to grow into a high-level content strategist

Is obsessed with improving content performance

Takes ownership and pride in their work

Wants to be part of building a meaningful brand

How to Apply

Please submit:

Your resume or portfolio

Examples of content you’ve created (videos, edits, or posts)

A short Loom/video explaining:

Why you’re a good fit

Your experience with viral/trending content

Your favorite content creator and why

If you’re just looking for a basic VA job, this is not for you.

If you want to grow, learn, and build something meaningful — we want to hear from you.



Test assignment: 



Part 1: Viral Research (Thinking Test)

Find 3 viral videos in the health / wellness / weight loss / thyroid niche.

For each video:

Link the video

Explain:

Why it went viral (hook, structure, emotion, curiosity, etc.)

Who the target audience is

How you would adapt this for our brand (functional medicine / thyroid)

Part 2: Script Writing (Strategy + Copy)

Write a short-form video scripts (30–60 sec):

Topic: Root cause vs conventional medicine

Style: Educational + authority

Each script must include:

Strong hook (first 3 seconds)

Clear flow

Call-to-action (book a call / learn more)

Part 3: Short-form edited video by you.

Please send a link. 

Part 4: Carousel of any you already made before.

Please send a link. 



Potential to grow with the family to full-time as the company grows.

title: Vehicle Wrap Graphic Designer — Adobe Illustrator Expert (Part-Time, Growing to Full-Time)
description:
About Us

 Summit Wraps and Graphics is a vehicle wrap and branding company based in Utah, USA. We do full wraps, partial wraps, decals, fleet graphics, and commercial branding for businesses of all sizes. We're growing fast and need a talented designer to join our team.



The Role

We're looking for a graphic designer who lives and breathes Adobe Illustrator. Your primary job is creating professional vehicle wrap mockups — taking a client's brand (logo, colors, messaging) and turning it into a stunning design laid out on vehicle templates.



You'll work closely with our team through our CRM system (GoHighLevel) and Slack. Jobs will come to you through our pipeline — you'll receive the client info, create mockup options, send proofs for approval, make revisions, and prepare production-ready files.



  What You'll Do

  - Design vehicle wrap mockups (full wraps, partial wraps, decals, fleet graphics)

  - Work with vehicle templates to create realistic mockups for client approval

  - Take client feedback and make revisions quickly

  - Prepare print-ready files with proper bleed, panel layout, and cut lines

  - Communicate with clients through our CRM to present designs and collect feedback

  - Organize design files and maintain our template library

  - Occasional marketing graphics (social media, ads, proposals) as needed



  Must-Have Skills

  - Expert-level Adobe Illustrator (this is non-negotiable — you'll use it daily)

  - Strong understanding of print design (CMYK, bleed, resolution, large format)

  - Clean, professional design aesthetic — especially bold commercial/industrial styles

  - Ability to work with vehicle templates and understand how designs wrap around 3D surfaces

  - Excellent English communication (you'll interact with clients)

  - Reliable internet connection and availability during US business hours (Mountain Time) for at

  least a few overlapping hours

  - Responsive — we value fast communication and quick turnaround



  Preferred Skills (Big Plus)

  - Vehicle wrap or signage industry experience

  - Knowledge of RIP software (VersaWorks) and cutting software (Graphtec Studio)

  - Adobe Photoshop proficiency

  - Canva and/or Figma experience

  - Experience with CRM systems (GoHighLevel or similar)

  - Understanding of vinyl materials, laminates, and installation considerations



  About the Position

  - Part-time to start: approximately 20 hours/week

  - Compensation: $4-6/hr USD depending on experience (paid weekly or bi-weekly)

  - Schedule: Flexible, but must have overlap with US Mountain Time for communication

  - Growth: As our workload increases, this role will grow to full-time with a pay increase

  - Long-term: We're looking for someone to grow with us, not a one-off freelancer



  What Success Looks Like

  - You receive a job brief (business name, logo, colors, phone, website, vehicle type)

  - Within 24-48 hours, you deliver 2-3 professional mockup options

  - Client picks one, you make revisions within a few hours

  - Final file is print-ready and organized properly

  - You communicate clearly at every step — no disappearing acts



  To Apply

  1. Send your portfolio with at least 3 examples of vehicle wrap designs OR large format

  print/signage work

  2. Tell us about your Illustrator experience — how many years, what type of projects

  3. What is your availability and preferred working hours?

  4. What is your expected hourly rate in USD?

cleaning company sales

cold calling

client outreach

closing

title: Airbnb Virtual Assistant (Guest Communication & Operations | Long-Term Role)
description:
1. Role Overview



We are a growing short-term rental and Airbnb business managing multiple properties with documented systems, SOPs, and clear expectations.



We are hiring a reliable, detail-oriented Airbnb Virtual Assistant to support daily operations, guest communication, scheduling, and administrative tracking. This is a long-term role for someone who is organized, calm under pressure, and comfortable following systems precisely.



This is not a one-off gig. We are looking for someone who wants stability, consistency, and the opportunity to grow with the business over time.



--



2. Core Responsibilities



You will be responsible for the day-to-day operational support of our rental portfolio, including:

 • Responding to guest messages (pre-stay, during stay, and post-stay) in a professional and empathetic manner

 • Dealing with occasional upset guests in a professional, courteous, and empathetic manner 

 • Managing calendars, reservations, and availability

 • Coordinating and scheduling cleaners, maintenance, and turnovers

 • Logging guest issues, i
, and resolutions accurately

 • Updating spreadsheets, checklists, and task logs

 • Following SOPs exactly and documenting any edge cases or exceptions

 • Proactively identifying potential problems before they escalate

 • Supporting general administrative tasks as assigned



--



3. Required Skills & Traits



This role is a good fit if you are:

 • Highly detail-oriented and organized

 • Comfortable working with people who are happy, upset, and everything in between

 • Comfortable working with checklists, systems, and written procedures

 • Calm, professional, and clear in written AND spoken English

 • Proactive and able to think one step ahead

 • Reliable with consistent availability

 • Able to manage multiple properties and tasks without losing accuracy

 • Interested in a long-term position, not short-term or part-time gigs



--



4. Tools & Experience (Preferred)



Experience with the following is helpful, but training will be provided:

 • Airbnb platform and/or a Property Management System (PMS) such as Guesty, HostAway, etc

 • Google Workspace (Google Sheets, Docs)

 • Slack or similar communication tools

 • Breezeway

 • Task tracking tools (Notion, ClickUp, or similar)

 • Prior experience supporting Airbnb or short-term rental operations is a strong plus



--



5. Work Structure, Pay & Growth

 • Schedule: 30-40+ hours per week. Opportunity for more work if desired.

 • Timezone Overlap: Must be available during PST hours.

 • Contract Type: Independent Contractor

 • Pay: $500-$800+/mo (paid consistently; performance-based increases over time)

 • Growth Path: Pay will reliably increase over time with bonus opportunities if you are proactive, vigilant, and always looking to improve.

 • Increased responsibilities

 • Pay raises based on performance

 • Potential leadership or senior VA role as the portfolio grows

 • Potential for investment opportunity into Airbnbs if you go above and beyond in the maintenance and growth of the business



We value consistency, trust, and long-term collaboration.



?



6. Application Instructions (Required)



To apply, follow these instructions carefully. Applications that do not follow them will not be reviewed.

 1. Start your application message with the phrase: “SYSTEMS FIRST”

 2. Briefly describe your experience (if any) with Airbnb, short-term rentals, or guest communication

 3. Answer the following  scenario in 3–5 sentences:

SCENARIO 1: A guest messages at 10:30 PM saying the internet is not working and they need it for work in the morning. How would you respond and what steps would you take?

SCENARIO 2: A guest messages saying that the house is not cleaned and the pool is dirty. How do you handle it and what steps would you take?

SCENARIO 3: A guest reports various potential issues with the house, but doesn't actually complain about them. How do you handle this so that it can be addressed before another guest complains about it?



--



We are looking for clear thinking, professionalism, attention to detail, and a desire to be a part of and grow this business!



--



If you are organized, reliable, and looking for a stable long-term role with a growing business, we encourage you to apply.

title: Brand Deal Fulfillment Coordinator
description:
We broker and manage brand partnerships on behalf of our creators — handling negotiations, deal structure, and execution so our talent can focus on making content. This role sits right at the center of that work.



We're looking for someone to own the execution side of our brand deals from close to delivery. You'll be the bridge between our brand clients and our talent — making sure creators are briefed, concepts get executed correctly, timelines are hit, and every deal lands cleanly.



From day one you'll be in direct contact with brands and talent on real, active campaigns. This is a coordination and accountability role, not a creative or strategy role. If you get satisfaction from making sure nothing falls through the cracks — and you want to learn the influencer business from the inside — this is the right seat.



—



HOW A DEAL MOVES THROUGH YOU



Receive & review the concept — Review deal terms and the creative brief. Make sure deliverables, usage rights, and deadlines are airtight before anything moves to the creator.

Brief the creator — Deliver the brief, confirm they understand expectations, and answer questions. You're the primary point of contact between the brand and talent during production.

Manage production & approvals — Track submissions, run the brand review process, and coordinate any revision requests or reshoots until the concept is signed off.

Confirm go-live — Verify content posted on schedule and all deliverable requirements were met.

Close it out — Alert accounting to send the invoice. Flag the completed deal to your manager so they can go after the next one.

—



QUALIFICATIONS



Required: · Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field · Strong written and verbal communication skills · Highly organized — able to manage multiple active deals simultaneously · Comfortable holding people to deadlines without burning the relationship · Detail-oriented — you catch when a submission doesn't match the brief



Preferred: · Prior experience in account management, talent coordination, PR, or agency operations · Familiarity with influencer marketing platforms (Grin, Aspire, or similar) · Working knowledge of major social platforms and how sponsorship disclosures work



—



THIS ROLE DOES NOT INCLUDE · Market research or trend analysis · Sourcing or pitching brand deals · Creative strategy or campaign concepting · Content creation or social media management



—





WHAT IT'S LIKE HERE



We care about output, not hours logged.



If you're early in your career, hungry to learn, and want to be close to where deals actually get made — we want to hear from you.



To be considered, please let respond by telling us the following in your response

1. Have you worked a deal fulfillment role before?

2. Are you someone who is extremely responsive on a moments notice?

3. What is your favorite animal and why?

?

title: Senior Liaison Officer - Remote
description:
We are a U.S.-based investment firm focusing on risk monitoring and management for prediction purpose. We specialize in watching geopolitical hot topics, providing updates in advance in order to prove the stable profits growth of clients we serve for. In different regions around the world, focuses vary, and we tailor our services to meet specific needs. Given to the geographical location and strategic importance, the Philippines has always been a hot hub around the Indo-Pacific region.



In such context, we are now seeking a Senior Liaison Officer for our Philippine office. This role will serve as a critical bridge between our clients, external stakeholders, and internal teams. The officer will focus on building networks, ensuring smooth information flow, and aligning client needs with strategic and practical goals.



Key Responsibilities:

•Information Gathering: Collect relevant information from government agencies, legislative bodies, and other stakeholders to support clients' policy analysis and decision-making.

•Report Writing: Prepare clear, concise, and well-organized reports based on on-site information collection, tailored to project requirements for clients' review.

•Risk Monitoring: Track emerging risks and provide timely warnings about potential changes that may affect the smooth operation of the tasks .



Qualifications:

•Prior employment or direct experience within key national governments, departments, and the Congress

•In-depth understanding of Philippine foreign policy, executive and intergovernmental communication channels, or other related topics

•Familiarity with national development plans, foreign policy priorities, and interagency coordination mechanisms

•Bachelor's degree or higher in Political Science, Public Administration, Law, International Relations, or related disciplines

•Demonstrated professionalism, discretion, and political sensitivity

•Ability to work independently, remotely, and with flexible hours

•Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English

title: Designer & Web Developer – Automation Platform (MVP/POC)
description: We are looking for a talented and versatile Designer & Web Developer to join our team in building the first version of an automation-driven platform from the ground up. You will be responsible for crafting intuitive, visually compelling interfaces that make complex automation workflows feel simple and accessible to everyday users. This role blends creative design thinking with solid front-end development skills, requiring proficiency in tools like Figma for design and React or similar frameworks for implementation. You will collaborate closely with our product and automation engineering team to translate business requirements into clean, functional, and scalable UI components. The initial scope focuses on delivering a polished MVP/POC, but this engagement is intended to grow into a long-term collaboration as the platform evolves. A strong eye for UX is essential, as you will be designing user flows, dashboards, and interaction patterns that simplify automation management for non-technical users. Experience integrating front-end interfaces with REST APIs or automation platforms such as Zapier, Make, or custom-built pipelines is a strong advantage. We value someone who is proactive, communicates clearly, and can work independently while aligning with a small, fast-moving team. The ideal candidate is comfortable with ambiguity in early-stage product development and excited by the opportunity to shape a product from its foundation. If you are a creative problem-solver who loves building meaningful digital experiences and wants to grow with a product long-term, we would love to connect.

title: Long-Form Video Editor (Agency Full Time Job)
description:
About Us

We’re The 1% Studio — a fast-growing editing agency that helps creators, entrepreneurs, and brands scale their online presence through high-quality content. We specialize in creating high-performing YouTube videos, Reels, and TikToks that drive growth, engagement, and authority.



About the Role

We’re looking for a highly skilled Long-Form YouTube Editor to join our team and create high-quality trading education content. This is not basic editing — we want someone who can bring concepts to life through clean visuals, strong storytelling, and advanced motion graphics.



You’ll be editing in-depth trading videos that break down strategies, concepts, and market analysis in a way that is both engaging and easy to understand. The goal is to turn complex information into visually compelling, high-retention content.



You must be able to edit at a very high level, similar to top creators in the finance and education space, with a strong focus on motion graphics, animation, and clean visual storytelling.



You’ll need to be able to edit videos like this:







Responsibilities



Edit long-form YouTube videos (8–20 minutes) focused on trading education

Use advanced motion graphics and animation to simplify and explain trading concepts

Create engaging intros (30–60 seconds) using the strongest hooks, visuals, and key 
nts

Design clean, high-quality on-screen visuals (charts, diagrams, overlays, annotations)

Maintain a consistent, premium visual style across all content

Structure videos for maximum retention, pacing, and clarity

Communicate clearly, take feedback well, and deliver edits on time



Requirements



Expert-level video editing skills (Premiere Pro / Final Cut / After Effects)

Strong motion graphics and animation ability (this is essential)

Experience editing educational or finance-related content is a big plus

Deep understanding of pacing, storytelling, and viewer retention

Ability to turn complex topics into simple, engaging visuals

Strong attention to detail in sound design, color grading, and overall polish

title: AI-First Customer Service Specialist (E-commerce)
description:
Contract type: Freelance / Part-time — potential to grow to full-time

Hours per week: 15–25 hrs to start

Location: Remote

Start date: ASAP





About this role

We're a fast-growing direct-to-consumer e-commerce brand looking for one sharp person to take full ownership of our customer service — built on AI.



We're moving away from an external CS agency and rebuilding our support operation around Minimal AI, an AI customer support platform that automates 90%+ of tickets. Your job is to make that system work as well as possible — and handle the small percentage of cases it can't.



This is not a traditional CS role. You won't be answering tickets all day. You'll be training the AI, improving its responses, and only stepping in when real human judgment is needed.





What you'll do

Training & improving the AI (80% of your time)

• Review AI-generated ticket responses and flag what's wrong, incomplete, or off-brand

• Give structured feedback to the Minimal AI Manager so it learns and improves

• Write and update the protocols the AI follows — return policies, edge cases, tone of voice

• Identify patterns: when the AI keeps getting something wrong, you fix the root cause

• Expand AI coverage over time — the goal is 90%+ resolution rate, you own that number





Handling what the AI can't (20% of your time)

• Complex complaints that need real judgment, not a script

• Sensitive situations where the customer relationship is at stake

• Escalations, high-value orders, or cases that need a personal response





Reporting

• Post a short daily summary in Slack: volume, AI resolution rate, anything notable

• Track KPIs weekly and update our tracker — no chasing required, you just do it

• Flag recurring issues or product complaints to the founders





Requirements

• Hands-on experience with AI tools in a professional setting — not just personal use

• Background in e-commerce customer service for brands doing over 5M annual revenue — you know what good looks like

• You understand that giving AI structured, specific feedback is a skill — and you have it

• Strong written English — you'll be communicating with customers and writing AI protocols.

• Self-directed — you don't need to be managed day-to-day.





Nice to have

• Experience with Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar helpdesk tools

• Shopify knowledge — order flows, refunds, fulfilment logic

• You've trained or fine-tuned an AI tool in a structured way before

• DTC brand experience





KPIs you'll own

• AI Resolution Rate — target 85%+ within 60 days, 90%+ within 90 days

• First Response Time — under 2 hours for human-handled tickets

• CSAT Score — above 4.2 / 5.0

• Refund Rate — under 5%, flag if trending up



One thing to know upfront

This role will look different in 12 months. As the AI gets smarter, the manual volume drops. Your job evolves from doing to managing and improving the system.

If that sounds like a problem, this isn't the right fit. If that sounds interesting, apply.

title: Short Form Video Clipper for Horror YouTube Channel
description:
Hi I'm Kat! I run a YouTube channel called Kat Watches Horror Movies where I watch scary films and scream my way through them. I have 116K+ subscribers, over 1.2 million views in the last 90 days, and a growing audience who genuinely love the chaotic energy of watching someone react to their favourite movies and get scared. I'm building out my online presence and I need help! I'm looking to hire 2–3 dedicated clippers to take my long-form YouTube videos and turn them into short, punchy, scroll-stopping clips for YouTube shorts, Instagram Reels, TikTok, and X.



Your Role:

- Watch my YouTube videos (full reactions are usually 30–50 min) and find the BEST moments-- big scares, funny reactions, dramatic commentary, chaotic energy, then edit them into 30–90 second vertical reels (9:16 format) with captions and clean cuts.

- Deliver 5–10 clips per week, ready to post 

- Match the vibe of my channel, lots of clips already up on YouTube so you can get a sense. 



Looking for someone who:

- Is experienced with short-form video editing. 

- Is great at adding captions (accurate, readable)

- Understands what makes a clip go viral (pacing, hooks, the right moment to cut)

- Reliable and communicative!

- Can turn out 5-10 videos per week



NO AI CLIPPING! THAT'S WHY I'M HERE! I already have Opus AI and have tried a bunch of these platforms already. At this point I can spot an AI clip a mile away!



MAJOR BONUS POINTS if you like/understand horror content, and you're funny!!



Please include the following in your application:

- Tell me who you are, your editing experience, and whether you've worked with creators before.

- 2–3 examples of short-form clips you've made (Send links! If you have a portfolio, or an account you've worked on, send it! Do you work on your own Instagram or YouTube? Send it!)



I'll be hiring 2–3 people from this posting! Excited to see your portfolios! Hoping to start ASAP!

title: Social Media Manager — NYC Korean Restaurants | Full-Time Remote
description:
We're 2020 Hindsight Marketing, a NYC-based agency managing social media for 6 Korean restaurants — from high-end speakeasies and upscale dessert boutiques to modern Korean dining. We need a full-time, Philippines-based Social Media Manager who can handle influencer outreach, content creation, and community management across Instagram and TikTok.



What you'll actually do every day:

You'll manage influencer outreach for NYC restaurants — identifying the right influencers, evaluating their audience (not just their follower count), writing personalized DMs, and tracking every interaction across multiple Google Sheets. You'll handle content calendars, community engagement, and review responses across 6 restaurant accounts. You'll create Instagram posters and graphics in Canva and edit short-form video for Reels and TikTok. You'll source trending restaurant content on TikTok and log reference videos for our content pipeline.





The hardest parts of this job:

-Influencer judgment. Our restaurants range from a $1M-renovation dessert boutique on 5th Avenue to an Eater Top 10 speakeasy to a casual Korean pub. The influencer who's perfect for one is completely wrong for another. You need to look at an influencer's content, their audience, their vibe, and know which restaurant they belong with. This requires cultural awareness of the NYC dining scene — not just knowing what Korean food is, but understanding the difference between a premium modern Korean restaurant and a casual KBBQ spot, and why that distinction matters for marketing.



-Design and content quality. NYC's restaurant marketing scene is extremely competitive and constantly evolving. The posters, graphics, and videos you create need to look like they belong on a premium NYC restaurant's feed — not like a generic Canva template. You need a strong visual eye, an understanding of what's trending, and the ability to match your design style to each restaurant's unique brand and positioning.





What we need from you:

-Video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, or similar — you'll be creating Reels and TikToks)

-Graphic design skills (Canva minimum, Photoshop/Illustrator a plus — you'll be creating posters and social media graphics that need to look premium)

-Strong English writing that sounds natural, not translated (Gen-Z/Millennial American tone)

-Google Sheets proficiency (data entry, filtering, basic formulas — you'll live in spreadsheets)

-Experience managing Instagram and/or TikTok accounts for food, restaurants, or hospitality

-Comfort working through an AI chatbot for daily task management (this is non-negotiable)

-Attention to detail — multiple sheets must be updated in parallel for every influencer action. Miss one update and the entire pipeline breaks.



Schedule & logistics:

Full-time, remote

Working hours: 12:00 PM – 8:00 PM EST (1:00 AM – 9:00 AM Philippines Time)

Daily time tracking via Timeproof is required

You'll work on a dedicated agency MacBook via remote access



Who thrives here:

People who like structure. People who follow instructions precisely and ask questions when something is unclear instead of guessing. People who take pride in doing things right, not just doing things fast. People who can look at a restaurant's Instagram and immediately see what's working and what isn't.



Who does NOT thrive here:

People who treat checklists as checkboxes without doing the actual work. People who mark things "done" when they aren't. People who want creative freedom without oversight. If you need constant hand-holding to start tasks, or if you disappear without communicating, this won't work.



To apply:

Submit your application and we'll send you a short screening form (takes about 10 minutes). Candidates who advance will be invited to a paid video interview and test. We compensate your time for the final evaluation,  we respect the effort!

title: Crypto T-Shirt Designer & Listing Specialist (AI-Friendly)

Key Responsibilities

cryptocurrency communities


 coin culture

finance humor

viral internet and 
 trends

TikTok

X 
)

crypto communities / social trends

what products and niches have the best opportunity

Design original crypto-related apparel graphics and text-based designs that fit our target market.

funny crypto designs

-based designs

Photoshop

Illustrator

or any other tools that help you create high-quality designs efficiently

3) Prepare Print Files for POD



You will create and export print-ready files for use on our print-on-demand partner platform.

You should understand how to prepare files for:

hoodies

stickers

and other POD accessories

4) Upload Products to POD Platform



You will upload finished designs into our print-on-demand partner website and prepare them for publishing.



This includes:



selecting the correct products

placing artwork properly on each product

generating product variants

selecting colors and sizes

checking design alignment and appearance

5) Sync Products to Etsy & Shopify



You will help manage the product publishing workflow by syncing products from our POD platform into our online stores.



This includes:



syncing to Etsy

syncing to Shopify

organizing listings

making sure listings are complete and accurate

checking that images, titles, variants, and pricing are correct

6) Create Product Mockups & Videos



You will create strong product visuals that help products convert.



This includes:



product mockup images

lifestyle mockups

clean e-commerce product images

short product videos / mockup videos when possible



We want visuals that are:



clean

modern

eye-catching

optimized for Etsy / Shopify / ads / social media

7) Write SEO Titles, Descriptions & Tags



You will write SEO-optimized listing content for each product.



This includes:



product titles

product descriptions

Etsy tags / keywords

Shopify product copy

SEO-friendly product naming



You should understand how to write listings that help products rank and convert.



Examples of what we want:



keyword-rich but natural titles

descriptions that feel fun, clean, and buyer-focused

strong keyword targeting for Etsy and Google search

Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who is:



creative and internet-savvy

familiar with crypto culture,

title: Top Sales Rep Performer Wanted: Cold Caller
description:
Part-Time Cold Calling Sales Rep / Real Estate (Land)



3-Month Contract | 20 hrs/week | Opportunity to Extend



We’re not looking for average — we’re looking for someone who thrives on outperforming targets and turning discipline into results.



At our company, we operate by three core values: Relentless Excellence, Disciplined Results, and Continuous Innovation. These aren’t just words — they guide how we work every day.



This role is focused primarily on cold calling landowners, identifying selling opportunities, and qualifying motivated sellers to keep our acquisition pipeline strong. If you’re competitive, organized, and enjoy conversations that lead to deals, this role could be a strong fit.



This is a part-time contract role for 3 months with the opportunity to extend based on performance.
